fields.name: Cultural Heritage Festival
fields.description: Celebrating the rich cultural heritage of the Philippines through traditional dances, folk music, and indigenous crafts exhibitions.

fields.name: Health and Wellness Seminar
fields.description: A health seminar covering topics such as mental health awareness, physical fitness, and proper nutrition for students.

fields.name: Disaster Risk Reduction Training
fields.description: A practical training on disaster preparedness, first aid, and emergency response procedures.

fields.name: Career Orientation Forum
fields.description: Professionals from various industries shared career insights, trends, and scholarship opportunities with graduating students.

fields.name: Reading Month Celebration
fields.description: A month-long program promoting a culture of reading through book fairs, storytelling contests, and library events.

fields.name: Technology Integration Symposium
fields.description: A symposium on leveraging technology in education, digital literacy, and responsible use of social media.

fields.name: Values Formation Seminar
fields.description: A values-oriented workshop focused on building character, ethics, and responsible citizenship among participants.

fields.name: Entrepreneurship Bootcamp
fields.description: A three-day intensive bootcamp on business planning, marketing, and social enterprise development for scholars and students.

fields.name: Leadership Summit 2024
fields.description: A full-day leadership development summit featuring keynote speakers, workshops, and team-building activities designed to cultivate leadership skills among students and scholars.

fields.name: Science and Technology Fair
fields.description: An exhibit showcasing innovative student research projects and inventions across various STEM disciplines.

fields.name: Community Outreach Program
fields.description: Scholars and students visited partner communities to conduct literacy campaigns, health awareness sessions, and tree-planting activities.

fields.name: Regional Youth Assembly
fields.description: A gathering of student leaders from across the region to discuss pressing issues affecting the youth and formulate policy recommendations.

fields.name: Anti-Drug Awareness Campaign
fields.description: An advocacy drive aimed at raising awareness among students about the dangers of illegal drugs and the importance of making healthy choices.

fields.name: Environmental Awareness Camp
fields.description: A two-day eco-camp focused on environmental stewardship, waste segregation practices, and advocacy for sustainable development.

fields.name: Financial Literacy Workshop
fields.description: A hands-on workshop teaching students the basics of budgeting, saving, and investing for their future.

fields.awarding_body: Ten Outstanding Students of the Philippines Foundation
fields.description: Awarded for demonstrating exceptional leadership qualities and inspiring peers through exemplary conduct and dedication to school and community.
Recipient of this award for spearheading community outreach initiatives and demonstrating remarkable volunteer spirit.
Awarded for demonstrating exceptional leadership qualities and inspiring peers through exemplary conduct and dedication to school and community.
Recognized for maintaining the highest academic standing in the institution while actively participating in extracurricular and community activities.
Honored for outstanding performance in leadership programs and significant contributions to the school's scholarship advocacy.
Recognized for excellence in research and innovation, contributing valuable findings that benefit the local community.

fields.bio: Dr. Ricardo Mendoza has served DepEd for 28 years, specializing in curriculum development and school administration. He led his school to three consecutive Brigada Eskwela national recognitions.
fields.course_program: Doctor of Education, Major in Educational Management – PLM

fields.bio: Mrs. Carmela Santos is a seasoned educator and Science advocate with 23 years in DepEd. Under her leadership, CCNSHS produced multiple DOST-SEI scholars annually.
fields.course_program: Master of Arts in Science Education – USC

fields.bio: Mr. Danilo Reyes is a respected educator and community builder with 20 years of school leadership experience. He is a strong proponent of inclusive and values-based education.
fields.course_program: Master of Arts in Educational Management – ADDU

fields.bio: Dr. Luzviminda Garcia is a distinguished educator with 26 years in DepEd and a track record of raising school NAT scores. She champions Gender and Development programs school-wide.
fields.course_program: Doctor of Philosophy in Education – CPU

fields.bio: Engr. Eduardo Villanueva is a licensed Civil Engineer and academic administrator with 18 years in higher education. He is the driving force behind the university's research and development agenda.

fields.address: 1 Doña Hemady Street, New Manila, Quezon City
fields.bio: Prof. Rosario Tolentino is a veteran academic leader with 30 years of service in higher education and a prolific researcher in social sciences. She is known for her student-first administration style.
fields.course_program: Doctor of Philosophy in Social Sciences – UP Diliman

fields.address: 34 Tiano Brothers Street, Cagayan de Oro City
fields.bio: Mr. Virgilio Castillo is a respected school administrator and youth advocate with 22 years in DepEd Mindanao. He initiated the school's award-winning Leadership Development Program.
fields.course_program: Master of Arts in Educational Management – XU

fields.bio: Dr. Maricel Aquino has championed multilingual education and cultural inclusivity at ZNHS for 15 years. She holds a doctorate in Linguistics and has published research on mother tongue-based instruction.
fields.course_program: Doctor of Philosophy in Linguistics – WMSU

fields.bio: Mr. Ernesto Flores is a community-centered principal who rebuilt LNHS after Typhoon Yolanda. He has received the Outstanding Public School Principal award from DepEd Region VIII.
fields.course_program: Master of Science in Disaster Risk Management – VSU

fields.bio: Dr. Gloria Delos Santos is an advocate for indigenous peoples' education and has integrated Ibaloi and Kankana-ey culture into the BCNHS curriculum. She earned recognition from NCIP for cultural integration efforts.
fields.course_program: Doctor of Education in Indigenous Studies – UB

pending_changes.bio: Dr. Gloria Delos Santos is an advocate for indigenous peoples' education and has integrated Ibaloi and Kankana-ey culture into the BCNHS curriculum. She earned recognition from NCIP for cultural integration efforts.
